title: 05 mango shell bursts into mecha
prompt: Use case: ads-marketing. REFERENCE AUTHORITY — Image 1 locks Raul, Meg, and wardrobe. Image 2 locks the world. Image 3 locks every helper. Image 4 locks the mango-mecha panels, proportions, joints, and material; place Raul's real uncovered face from Image 1 in its open face aperture. BEAT — Heroic mid-transformation wide. The giant mango shell opens outward in five thick elastic peel sections rather than shattering. Raul rises from the center as those exact sections fold and lock into the referenced mecha's chest, shoulders, arms, and legs. Orange lightning joins the pieces. Six helpers ride or guide the moving panels with their hands. Meg remains safely visible on the next seat. Preserve the empty rows and field behind the event. AVOID — glass debris, goo blast, generic robot, gummy bodybuilder, helmet hiding Raul, weapons, helpers redesigned as humans, crowd surrounding them.

resolved_params.system_prompt: Create one polished cinematic live-action Peelerz commercial styleframe, never a collage, contact sheet, or storyboard grid. Treat each attached image only according to its declared authority. Preserve Raul and Meg as the same teenagers, and preserve the established top-of-bleachers world, dusk light, clothing, and geography. Attached ingredient sheets are exact character or object design authorities; reproduce them faithfully rather than redesigning them from prose. Keep the surreal event localized and legible inside the live-action stadium. Candy remains tactile, translucent, appetizing, and benign. No anatomy, gore, generic gummy bears, captions, borders, watermarks, or invented package copy.
